title: Registered Staff Nurse (RN) for Surgical Clinic (G/S - Hepatobiliary)
description:
Registered Staff Nurse (RN) for Surgical Clinic

Why Join Us?

Are you looking to transition from the high-pressure ward cycle into a specialized clinic environment? This isn't just a clinic role—it’s a gateway to becoming a Surgical Specialist Nurse. We offer a rare opportunity to move beyond general nursing. We will invest in you, providing on-the-job training for Operating Theatre (OT) procedures, allowing you to sharpen your technical skills while maintaining a stable, professional lifestyle.

The Perks of the Role

  • ⚖️ Work-Life Harmony: Stable 5.5-day work week (No night shifts!).

  • 💰 Financial Rewards: Competitive salary, AWS (13th month bonus), and medical benefits.

  • 📈 Career Growth: Direct mentorship from leading Hepatobiliary surgeons and ample training opportunities for surgical care.

  • 📍 Prestigious Locations: Work in Singapore’s most renowned medical hubs—Mount Elizabeth Orchard and Gleneagles.

Your Impact

As a core member of our surgical team, you won't just be "filling out charts." You will be the backbone of the patient journey:

  • The Specialist’s Right Hand: Assist doctors during consultations, ward rounds, and surgical procedures in the OT.

  • Clinical Excellence: Manage post-surgical recovery, including specialized wound care and drainage management.

  • Patient Advocate: Act as the primary point of contact, ensuring patients feel supported and informed from consultation to recovery.

  • Technical Mastery: Learn to navigate the fast-paced environment of Surgical clinics and operating theatres (we’ll train you!).

Who We Are Looking For

We value attitude and heart as much as technical skill. You’re a great fit if:

  • You hold a Diploma or Degree in Nursing and are SNB Registered.

  • You are a "people person" with the interpersonal flair to handle a private-sector clientele.

  • You are eager to learn—prior experience in OT or private clinics is a bonus, but your drive to grow is what matters most.

  • You are a proactive team player who takes pride in a well-run clinic.

Join Our Growing Practice

Be part of a fast-growing team that specializes in life-changing hepatobiliary surgery. We don't just treat patients; we provide a premium healthcare experience.

Ready to take the next step? Apply now with your updated CV and SNB registration details.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be notified. We can't wait to meet you!

postedCompany.description:
DLS Orchard Pte Ltd is a leading and dynamic surgical practice that was established since 2018 and has been providing high quality healthcare services to both local and international patients at various clinic locations.


Being a patient centered organisation, we provide modern, safe and effective treatment to achieve the best outcomes for all our patients.


We are a general surgical practice with sub-specialty in gastointestinal and hepatobiliary surgery.

We have clinics in Mount Elizabeth Orchard and Gleneagles Hospital.


We are constantly seeking for driven individuals with the passion to care for our patients to join us in delivering the highest level of service excellence. If you are looking to thrive in a fast paced work environment and enjoy working with and helping people, apply to join us.
postedCompany.name: DLS ORCHARD PTE. LTD.
